title: Bill Bullard. Chief Executive Officer R-CALF USA
description: Bill Bullard joined R-CALF USA as the organization’s first Chief Executive Officer at national headquarters in Billings, Mont., on April 9, 2001. Bullard, formerly a cow/calf rancher in Perkins County, S.D., served as the Executive Director of the South Dakota Public Utilities Commission from 1995-2001.  He has a B.S. in Political Science from Black Hills State University and completed a year of graduate studies at the University of South Dakota.
